text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, hey! I was awesome out there, wasn't I?
Super strong and super cool, right?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hello?! Don't you have anything to say to me?
choice_data_list: I knew you could do it!
I knew you could do it!
You can be even mightier, can't you?
You can be even mightier, can't you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Hello?! Don't you have anything to say to me?
choice_data_list: I knew you could do it!
I knew you could do it!
You can be even mightier, can't you?
You can be even mightier, can't you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Right?! I knew I could do it too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But I need mooore. C'mon, keep the praise
coming!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
And I'm definitely gonna win the next one too, so
you better get more compliments ready!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Obviously! ♪ Who do you think I am?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
This is only the beginning. My win streak started
the moment I set foot on the track!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Get ready, 'cause I'm gonna go above and
beyond even your expectations!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: I'll show you what a real winner looks like!
